visuals.title: Vertical vs Horizontal Scaling
visuals.description: Visual diagram for Vertical vs Horizontal Scaling
visuals.svgContent:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="420" height="350">
  <defs>
    <linearGradient id="bg" x1="0%" y1="0%" x2="0%" y2="100%">
      <stop offset="0%" style="stop-color:#E3F2FD"/>
      <stop offset="100%" style="stop-color:#BBDEFB"/>
    </linearGradient>
  </defs>
  <rect width="420" height="350" fill="url(#bg)" rx="12"/>
  <text x="210" y="25" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="13" font-weight="bold" fill="#1565C0">Scalable Computing Over the Internet</text>

  <!-- Client Device -->
  <rect x="160" y="300" width="100" height="40" fill="#2196F3" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="0.3s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="210" y="325" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Client Device
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="0.5s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>

  <!-- Internet Cloud -->
  <ellipse cx="210" cy="180" rx="120" ry="60" fill="#64B5F6" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="0.6s" fill="freeze"/>
  </ellipse>
  <text x="210" y="185" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Internet Cloud
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="0.8s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>

  <!-- Server Cluster -->
  <rect x="60" y="50" width="300" height="60" fill="#1565C0" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="0.9s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="210" y="85" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Server Cluster (Scalable Resources)
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.1s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>

  <!-- Connection Arrows -->
  <line x1="210" y1="240" x2="210" y2="300" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="2" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.4s" fill="freeze"/>
  </line>
  <line x1="210" y1="120" x2="210" y2="180" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="2" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.7s" fill="freeze"/>
  </line>

  <!-- Arrowheads -->
  <polygon points="210,300 205,290 215,290" fill="#1565C0" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.4s" fill="freeze"/>
  </polygon>
  <polygon points="210,120 205,130 215,130" fill="#1565C0" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.7s" fill="freeze"/>
  </polygon>

  <!-- Data Flow Animation -->
  <circle cx="210" cy="260" r="5" fill="#FF5722" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.2s" begin="2s" fill="freeze"/>
    <animate attributeName="cy" from="300" to="120" dur="1.5s" begin="2.2s" repeatCount="indefinite"/>
  </circle>
  <circle cx="210" cy="140" r="5" fill="#4CAF50" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.2s" begin="2.5s" fill="freeze"/>
    <animate attributeName="cy" from="120" to="300" dur="1.5s" begin="2.7s" repeatCount="indefinite"/>
  </circle>
</svg>
